    model = Post
    template_name= 'blog/home.html'
    context_object_name = 'posts'
    ordering = ['-date_posted'] 
    paginate_by = 3
class UserPostListView(ListView):
    model = Post
    template_name= 'blog/user_posts.html'
    context_object_name = 'posts'
